events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail / high risk** — a missing seal-off fitting at a classified-area boundary is a mandatory NEC 501.15/505.16/500.16 requirement, since it blocks migration of flammable gases/vapors/dust (and flame) across the boundary. Corrective action is to halt closeout and install the listed seal before the raceway is concealed or terminated.
